title: Pan-Seared German Duck Breast with Toast
description: A classic German dish featuring a pan-seared duck breast served with toasted bread and a side of bitter greens.

ingredients.name: Bitter greens
ingredients.notes: Choose a variety like kale or arugula

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the duck breast with salt and pepper on both sides.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated skillet and sear the duck breast for 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the duck breast from the skillet and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Warm the crunchy bread in the skillet or in the oven.
Toss the bitter greens with a squeeze of lemon juice and a pinch of salt.
Serve the pan-seared duck breast with toasted bread and a side of bitter greens.
